author: Jack Princz
name: OrthoInit + Muon + Int6 MLP3x + SmearGate + BigramHash
blurb: Six improvements over baseline: (1) Orthogonal + muP-scaled init. (2) Int6 per-row on MLP+attention with zstd-22, int8 tok_emb and bigram embed. (3) 3x MLP. (4) Tuned Muon: matrix_lr=0.02, momentum 0.99, warmdown 3000, grad clip 0.3. (5) SmearGate + BigramHash(4096x128). (6) Sliding window eval stride=256, seq=2048.
